---
title: "Henry Edward Moberly"
---

## Henry Edward Moberly

**Dates:** (1822-1907)

### Description

nephew of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly

### Biography

‘Harry’ Moberly and his sisters Louisa and Rosa Moberly, known as the ‘Indian Moberlys’ were the children of Dr Moberly’s brother Henry Moberly who worked in India, and lived with their uncle and aunt from 1841. [<i>Dulce Domum</i> 72;  www.rootsweb.com, Pocock family file, gives their dates.

### Letters

- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
